name: DELCATH SYSTEMS, INC.
business: Delcath Systems is an interventional oncology company focused on the treatment of cancers primary or metastatic to the liver. Its lead product, HEPZATO KIT (melphalan for Injection/Hepatic Delivery System), is approved by the FDA for adult patients with uveal melanoma with unresectable hepatic metastases. In Europe, the hepatic delivery system is sold as CHEMOSAT, without melphalan, used to treat a wide range of liver cancers.

exposures.sentence: Our lead product, the HEPZATO TM KIT (melphalan for Injection/Hepatic Delivery System), a drug/device combination product ( HEPZATO or HEPZATO KIT ), was approved by the US Food and Drug Administration (the FDA ) on August 14, 2023, indicated as a liver-directed treatment for adult patients with uveal melanoma with unresectable hepatic metastases affecting less than 50% of the liver and no extrahepatic disease, or extrahepatic disease limited to the bone, lymph nodes, subcutaneous tissues, or lung that is amenable to resection, or radiation.

In Europe, the hepatic delivery system is a stand-alone medical device having the same device components as HEPZATO, but without the melphalan hydrochloride and is approved for sale under the trade name CHEMOSAT Hepatic Delivery System for Melphalan, or CHEMOSAT, where it has been used at major medical centers to treat a wide range of cancers in the liver.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 clinical trial for mCRC primary endpoint hPFS readout
catalysts.sentence: The trial's primary endpoint, hPFS, is anticipated to read out by the end of 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 clinical trial for mBC primary endpoint hPFS readout
catalysts.sentence: The trial's primary endpoint, hPFS, is anticipated to read out by the end of 2028, while results for OS, a secondary endpoint, is expected in 2029.
On October 18, 2025, independent investigators presented results from the Phase 2 portion of the CHOPIN trial.

On November 19, 2025, our board of directors authorized a share repurchase program under which we may repurchase up to $25 million of our outstanding shares of common stock, from time to time, through open market transactions, privately negotiated transactions or in such other manners approved by the board of directors.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for liver cancer in the United States is approximately 200,000 patients per year.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the total potential addressable market for liver cancer (primary and metastatic) is approximately 200,000 in the United States per year.

tamClaims.claim: Annual addressable market for uveal melanoma liver metastases in the US and Europe is approximately $600 million.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the annual addressable market for this indication in the United States and Europe is approximately $600 million per year.

tamClaims.claim: TAM for liver-dominant mCRC third-line treatment is 6,000-10,000 patients annually in the US.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the total addressable market ( TAM ) for liver-dominant mCRC receiving third-line treatment is between 6,000 and 10,000 patients annually in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 7,000 US patients annually have HER2-negative mBC with liver metastases and are candidates for third-line treatment.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that approximately 7,000 patients annually in the United States are affected by HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer with liver metastases and are candidates for third line treatment.
